source.name: HCAI Hospital Annual Financial Data (Selected)
source.publisher: CA Department of Health Care Access and Information
source.license: Public record (HCAI via CHHS Open Data)

cadence: annual filings; HCAI re-extracts ~twice a year as audits land
caveats: Each figure is the hospital's own annual disclosure to HCAI (Hospital Annual Financial Disclosure Report). The prior fiscal year is mostly audited; the latest year is largely still in process — every hospital carries its report status.

Medi-Cal figures are net revenue the hospital reports receiving for Medi-Cal patients (traditional fee-for-service and managed care separately) — a yearly total per hospital, not plan-by-plan payments.
Hospitals only: Medi-Cal money flowing to physicians, clinics, pharmacies, and other non-hospital providers is not in this data.
